innateAbility.name: Bone Chill
innateAbility.description: Applies a movement speed slow debuff to all enemy units affected by Kaldr's abilities.

abilities.name: Cold Feet
abilities.description: Places a frozen hex on an enemy unit that can be dispelled by moving away from the initial cast point.If the enemy unit doesn't move out of the given distance within a period of time, it will be stunned and frozen in place.

abilities.name: Ice Vortex
abilities.description: Applies a movement speed slow and magic resistance reduction to enemy units within its radius.

abilities.name: Chilling Touch
abilities.description: Enhances Kaldr's attack with increased attack range, heavy magic damage, and movement speed slow.

abilities.name: Ice Blast
abilities.description: Launches a tracer toward any location, which must be triggered again to mark the final point-targeted location, this area will be blasted by a damaging explosion of hail.The further the tracer travels, the larger the explosion radius.

abilities.name: Release
abilities.description: Marks the final point-targeted location, and releases the ice blast.The tracer now will explode at the final location.
